checks_performed: Blind protocol: verifying instance received only the charter criterion and raw source texts; no prior classification visible (freeze commits dab655c, f4136f1)
All 15 cluster-7 works independently classified against instantiate-vs-reference-v1
All 3 theory paper abstracts re-fetched from arXiv and independently judged on mechanism existence
Row-by-row comparison against the pipeline's recorded classifications performed only after the returns were frozen (comparison.md)
conflicts_of_interest: the same responsible human (the owner) stands behind proposer, executor, and verifier instances; independence here is substantive (blind primary-source re-reading), not institutional.

findings.statement: Row works-ubermorgen-next-biennial-machine: blind classification agrees (references-only), but the row's underlying source verification remains 'pending' in the pinned corpus — classification agreement does not substitute for the missing source verification; the claim's honest-status machinery already accounts for it.

independence_profile.code_path: no pipeline code executed — manual blind protocol per task-packets/K1-T06.yaml (verification, not replication; MTH-014 boundary respected)
independence_profile.data_access_path: brief-embedded material only; the blind instance had no repository, database, or web access
independence_profile.model_family: large language model, fresh isolated instance; family shared with the engineering tooling
independence_profile.prompt_family: blind verification brief (corpora/model-collapse/verification/blind-brief.md), frozen commit dab655c — a lineage distinct from every pipeline prompt
independence_profile.retrieval_path: raw decisive_move texts taken from the pinned works-atlas snapshot and paper abstracts re-fetched from arXiv on 2026-07-22 — never from the pipeline's classified corpus rows

rationale: Blind re-reading of all fifteen cluster-7 decisive_move texts against the locked charter criterion reproduced the pipeline's classification exactly: fourteen references-only, one instantiates (Hammond V3 — 'each exhibition's own photographs and collages are fed back as training data for the next' clears Step 1 across at least two generations). The boundary cases (Giraud: human-generational relay; Baudelaire: conversational not training loop; Cheng: inference-time belief updating; Rahal: environmental audio feedback) were independently drawn on the same lines the charter's Step 2 prescribes. 15/15 row agreement, zero 'qualifies'. The classification the contested claim rests on holds under blind re-derivation from primary material.
reviewer_role: blind primary-source verifier (K1-T06, candidate c of the 2026-07-22 owner decision)
